<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Página-1" id="Yaswf_PeOYSebLhqtXop"> <mxGraphModel dx="1471" dy="826" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "sequenceDiagram
 participant H as Command Handler
 participant EB as EventBus
 participant AH as AuditoriaEventHandler
 participant Auth as AuthService
 participant AR as AuditoriaRepository

 H->>EB: publish(AuditableActionOcurred)
 EB->>AH: __invoke(event)
 AH->>Auth: getCurrentUser()
 AH->>AR: store(Auditoria::create(...))
 Note over AR: Persiste en tabla auditorias",
 "config": null
